recommended.text: The Acme Cosmos beta wrapped with sixty builders shipping live demos you can open.
recommended.rationale: Leads with the concrete anchor and the openable-demo proof.

variant_a.text: Sixty builders. One weekend. Every demo went out as a working link people can open.
variant_a.rationale: Staccato cadence, same proof, different angle.

variant_b.text: We asked for usable demos and got sixty. Here is what the beta produced this weekend.
